retry_reason: Firmware loading failure is typically persistent (missing or invalid firmware file); retrying with the same name will not succeed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is firmware loading and initialization for VCE; refcount management is incidental (amdgpu_ucode_request/release are used for firmware lifecycle, not as a reference-count wrapper).
